old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-bjzk","title":"[cross-impl] unresolved merge conflicts in lichen-core/src/announce.rs","description":"rust/lichen-core/src/announce.rs contains git conflict markers (\u003c\u003c\u003c\u003c\u003c\u003c\u003c HEAD, =======, \u003e\u003e\u003e\u003e\u003e\u003e\u003e origin/worktree-worker24) from CCP-9 rx_channel integration.
